column1: # Partition table for bare ESP32-S3 modules with 8 MB flash (GD25Q64).
#   - nvs       20 KB     device cert + WiFi creds + sensor calibration
#   - otadata    8 KB     OTA boot selector (must be 0x2000)
# Total: 0x800000 = 8 MB exactly. Mirrors partitions_owb_16mb.csv structure
# (minus the larger app/spiffs) so a successful OTA migration on this bench
# validates the same path for the OWB 16 MB rollout.
# Factory rescue partition intentionally omitted (separate follow-up).
